help.title: About
help.projectIntro: A whiteboard application with teleprompter and screen recording, based on Excalidraw
help.presentationMode: Presentation Mode: Fixed resolution based on aspect ratio
help.faqCameraQ: What if my device has no camera?
help.faqCameraA: You can use DroidCam to turn your phone into a webcam
help.faqMicrophoneQ: What if my device has no microphone?
help.faqMicrophoneA: You can use your phone as a microphone with WO Mic or DroidCam
help.faqFormatQ: What format is the recorded video?
help.faqFormatA: The recorded video is in MP4 format and can be downloaded directly
help.faqBrowserA: Chrome, Edge, Firefox and other modern browsers are recommended
help.faqFontQ: What if Chinese handwriting font doesn't appear?
help.faqFontA: Try refreshing the page, font loading may take time
help.usageStep1: Draw on canvas - Use Excalidraw tools
help.usageStep2: Add slides - Click "+" to add presentation pages
help.usageStep3: Open teleprompter - Click the teleprompter icon
help.usageStep4: Start recording - Click record button, select area and start
